query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmtk b on a.tk_co = b.tk where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause

declare @s nvarchar(4000), @baseCurrency varchar(32), @udFields varchar(128) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select * into #r from @@prime$partition$current where 1 = 0 select @udFields = 'ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, ma_hd, ma_ku, so_lsx, ma_phi' select @s = 'insert into #r (ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_ct, tk_co, dvt, so_luong, gia_nt, tien_nt, dien_giai, gia, tien, stt_rec_hd, stt_rec0hd, hd_so, hd_ln, stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ' + @udFields + ')' select @s = @s + ' select getdate(), '''', '''', rtrim(a.tk_vt), '''', so_luong, ' select @s = @s + case when @vcCurrency = @vcCurrencyInvoice then 'a.gia_nt, a.tien_nt, a.dien_giai, a.gia, a.tien' else case when @vcCurrency = @baseCurrency then 'a.gia, a.tien, a.dien_giai, a.gia, a.tien' else '0, 0, a.dien_giai, 0, 0' end end select @s = @s + ', a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.so_ct, a.line_nbr, ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '') + ''', a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, ' + @udFields select @s = @s + ' from d31$' + left(replace(@e, '''', ''), 6) + ' a left join dmtk b on a.tk_vt = b.tk where a.stt_rec = ''' + replace(@vcID, '''', '') + '''' exec sp_executesql @s
select @@fieldExternal from #r a left join dmtk b on a.tk_co = b.tk order by line_nbr drop table #r

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ hóa đơn$$90
